headline: 3 Unpopular Stocks with Open Questions
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.

headline: European markets close lower as traders monitor Iran war developments
summary: European stocks finished Wednesday down, as traders monitor intensifying operations in the Middle East.

headline: General Dynamics (GD) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback And 9.9% Undervaluation Estimate
summary: Why General Dynamics Is On Investors’ Radar Today General Dynamics (GD) is back in focus after recent trading, with the stock last closing at $355.59. With a value score of 4 and annual revenue of about $52.55b, investors are reassessing its profile. See our latest analysis for General Dynamics.
